description: Editorial Manager (EM) by Aries Systems. The second most widely used system. Used by Springer, most Elsevier journals, Lippincott/Wolters Kluwer, and many society publishers.
step_by_step: 1. Go to the journal's EM URL (format: journalname.editorialmanager.com)
2. Register or log in with your EM account
3. Click 'Submit New Manuscript' in the Author Main Menu
5. Enter title, abstract, keywords, and author details (all co-authors need EM accounts)
6. Paste COVER LETTER in the text box — do NOT upload as a file
7. Upload manuscript file (Word preferred; LaTeX as ZIP with all dependencies)
8. Upload each FIGURE as a separate file
10. EM builds a PDF proof automatically — review it before submitting
11. Accept terms and submit — you will receive a submission number
common_errors: Cover letter uploaded as file instead of pasted → editors may not see it
LaTeX without figures/bibliography in ZIP → system cannot compile
Co-authors without EM accounts → submission blocked
Track changes not accepted → shows markup in proof PDF

file_requirements.cover_letter: Paste into EM text box (not a file upload)
file_requirements.figures: TIFF, EPS, JPEG, or PDF; each < 10MB; named Fig 1, Fig 2 ...

elsevier_extras.highlights: Required for all Elsevier journals: 3–5 bullets, ≤ 85 characters each
